# Joufflu WPF Components

> WPF inputs and reusable controls for .NET, built on a small design system of themed brushes, dimensions, sizing and spacing helpers. Every control reads its colours through `DynamicResource`, so the whole UI re-themes live between Light and Dark with no restart.

Joufflu ships as three NuGet packages that build on each other: `Joufflu` (core styles, theming, custom controls, and restyled native WPF controls), `Joufflu.Inputs` (input controls), and `Joufflu.Navigation` (navigation menu and modal overlays). These docs mirror the `Joufflu.Samples` gallery app: same titles, descriptions and code snippets. All links below point to the raw Markdown source.

## Start here

- [Overview and getting started](https://github.com/ndegheselle/Joufflu/blob/main/docs/index.md): what the library is, package layout, and the four-step setup (add packages, merge `Resources.xaml`, initialize `ThemeManager`).
- [Tutorial: a navigable app shell](https://github.com/ndegheselle/Joufflu/blob/main/docs/tutorial.md): builds an MVVM app on `Joufflu.Navigation` — shared shell view model, view-model-first navigation, an example page, a modal overlay and a toast.

## Native controls

- [Buttons](https://github.com/ndegheselle/Joufflu/blob/main/docs/natives/buttons.md): default button plus named styles — solid, soft and outline variants, icon (`IsSquare`) buttons, and `ControlProperties.Size`.

## Inputs (`Joufflu.Inputs`)

- [Numeric & format inputs](https://github.com/ndegheselle/Joufflu/blob/main/docs/inputs/numeric-inputs.md): `NumericUpDown`, `DecimalUpDown`, `TimeSpanPicker`, and the underlying `FormatTextBox`.
- [Search & combo](https://github.com/ndegheselle/Joufflu/blob/main/docs/inputs/search-and-combo.md): debounced `Search` box and the filtering `ComboBoxSearch`.
- [Combo box tags](https://github.com/ndegheselle/Joufflu/blob/main/docs/inputs/combo-box-tags.md): multi-selection `ComboBoxTags` with removable tags and optional free entry.
- [Text editable](https://github.com/ndegheselle/Joufflu/blob/main/docs/inputs/text-editable.md): `TextEditable`, a value that becomes an editable text box on demand.
- [File picker](https://github.com/ndegheselle/Joufflu/blob/main/docs/inputs/file-picker.md): `FilePicker`, selects a file through the system dialog.
- [Color picker](https://github.com/ndegheselle/Joufflu/blob/main/docs/inputs/color-picker.md): `ColorPicker` with hex field and a saturation/hue/alpha popup.

## Navigation (`Joufflu.Navigation`)

- [Navigation menu](https://github.com/ndegheselle/Joufflu/blob/main/docs/navigation/navigation-menu.md): collapsible side menu driven by a `Navigator`, with groups, nesting and a `TargetResolver`.
- [Overlays](https://github.com/ndegheselle/Joufflu/blob/main/docs/navigation/overlays.md): stacking modal overlays, `OverlayOptions`, and awaiting a result from `Show`.

## Custom controls (`Joufflu`)

- [Font icon](https://github.com/ndegheselle/Joufflu/blob/main/docs/custom-controls/font-icon.md): `FontIcon`, a Lucide icon-font glyph.
- [Badge](https://github.com/ndegheselle/Joufflu/blob/main/docs/custom-controls/badge.md): themed pill in the semantic colours, sized via `ControlProperties.Size`.
- [Spinner](https://github.com/ndegheselle/Joufflu/blob/main/docs/custom-controls/spinner.md): indeterminate loading indicator.
- [Toasts](https://github.com/ndegheselle/Joufflu/blob/main/docs/custom-controls/toasts.md): transient notifications from `IToastService`, including sticky toasts.

## Toolkit (`Joufflu`)

- [Sizing](https://github.com/ndegheselle/Joufflu/blob/main/docs/toolkit/sizing.md): `ControlProperties.Size` and `IsSquare` attached properties.
- [Spacing](https://github.com/ndegheselle/Joufflu/blob/main/docs/toolkit/spacing.md): `Spacing.Gap` attached property for gaps between panel children.
- [Tooltip](https://github.com/ndegheselle/Joufflu/blob/main/docs/toolkit/tooltip.md): `Tooltip.Content` and `Tooltip.Placement` for themed tooltips on any element.
- [Theme](https://github.com/ndegheselle/Joufflu/blob/main/docs/toolkit/theme.md): `ThemeManager` (System/Light/Dark plus registering custom themes by name) and binding a theme switcher.
- [Customize theme](https://github.com/ndegheselle/Joufflu/blob/main/docs/toolkit/customize-theme.md): the live theme editor, presets and override resource keys.
- [Application shell](https://github.com/ndegheselle/Joufflu/blob/main/docs/toolkit/application-shell.md): `ThemedWindow`, title-bar-over-content, and `NavigationContainer`.

## Optional

- [Documentation site](https://ndegheselle.github.io/Joufflu/): the rendered docs.
- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/ndegheselle/Joufflu/): source, samples and issues.
- [Joufflu on NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/Joufflu): core package (styles & theming).
- [Joufflu.Inputs on NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/Joufflu.Inputs): input controls.
- [Joufflu.Navigation on NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/Joufflu.Navigation): navigation & overlays.
